chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS Constitutional Petition No.S-59 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 26.02.2026 Mr. Shah Nawaz Jinjhi advocate for the petitioners a/w petitioners. Mr. Muhammad Sharif Solangi, A.A.G a/w SIP Ali Mardan Lashari, I.O of F.I.R No.33/ 2026 of P.S Moro and ASI Muhammad Jumman of PS Dilber Khan Mahar. = Petitioners have filed this petition U/A 199 of the Islamic Republic of Pakistan, 1973 seeking direction to the official respondents not to cause harassment to the petitioners at the behest of private respondents. Respondents No.3 to 5 filed their respective reports, which are taken on record. It reflects that F.I.R bearing Crime No. 33/ 2026 of P.S Moro for alleged abduction of Mst. Ghulam Sakina d/o Nabi Bux w/o petitioner Muhammad Mushtaque has already been lodged. Learned counsel for the petitioners submit that petitioners are on interim pre-arrest bail in said crime, which was granted vide Order dated 26-02-2026 by the Circuit Court @ Hyderabad. Learned A.A.G Sindh who is present in some other matters, waives the notice and submits that protection is fundamental right of the petitioners and the same will be provided to them in accordance with law. In view of above, the instant petition is disposed of with directions to the official respondents to provide due protection to the petitioners in accordance with law as and when they approach the concerned police station and ensure that no harm is caused to them. Copy of this Order to communicate with concerned S.S.P for information and compliance.

In view of above, the instant petition is disposed of with directions to the official respondents to provide due protection to the petitioners in accordance with law as and when they approach the concerned police station and ensure that no harm is caused to them. Copy of this Order to communicate with concerned S.S.P for information and compliance. The instant petition is disposed of in above terms. JUDGE “Saleem”
